mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.title, LEFT(f.content, 100) AS summary, IFNULL(c.name, '其它') AS category, f.status, f.like_count AS likeCount, f.comment_count AS commentCount, f.view_count AS viewCount, f.hot_score AS hotScore FROM assistant_feedback f LEFT JOIN assistant_feedback_category c ON c.id = f.category_id WHERE f.delete_flag = 0 AND f.status != 'CLOSED' ORDER BY f.hot_score DESC, f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
